title: Control of (Copy) Tag in Duplicated Items
excerpt: When duplicating and then moving an item, Monday adds the suffix (copy) to the name.  Allowing control of this suffix when duplicating including the ability to remove it during automation would be helpful.

posts.author: RMB (Mike Bocker)
posts.cookedHtml: When duplicating and then moving an item, Monday adds the suffix (copy) to the name. Allowing control of this suffix when duplicating including the ability to remove it during automation would be helpful.
